marketing_seeds: For nurse practitioners in medical clinics processing 10-20 patient records per day, inefficient tracking of patient histories causes delayed care and mismanagement. We provide a tool that tracks patient medical history and generates personalized care plans instead of manual record-keeping and generic care plan templates.
Difficulty in tracking comprehensive patient medical histories and generating personalized care plans.
